About Us

Securing Indonesia's Digital Future

PT Cyber Ventures Indonesia is a leading cybersecurity firm dedicated to protecting organizations across Indonesia from evolving digital threats.

Our Story

Founded in 2014, PT Cyber Ventures Indonesia emerged from a simple yet powerful vision: to elevate Indonesia's cybersecurity posture and protect organizations from the growing threat of cyber attacks.

What began as a small team of passionate security professionals has grown into one of Indonesia's most trusted cybersecurity firms. We've completed over 500 security assessments for enterprises across banking, government, healthcare, and technology sectors.

Our team comprises certified ethical hackers, security architects, and compliance experts who bring deep technical expertise and industry knowledge to every engagement. We combine global best practices with local market understanding to deliver solutions that work for Indonesian organizations.

10+
Years Experience
500+
Security Assessments
100+
Enterprise Clients
50+
Security Experts

Our Mission

To empower Indonesian organizations with world-class cybersecurity capabilities, enabling them to innovate and grow securely in an increasingly digital world.

Our Vision

To be the most trusted cybersecurity partner for enterprises in Indonesia and Southeast Asia, setting the standard for security excellence and innovation.

Our Core Values

The principles that guide our work and define our culture

Security First

We prioritize security in every decision, ensuring our clients receive the highest level of protection against evolving cyber threats.

Precision & Excellence

We deliver accurate, thorough assessments with meticulous attention to detail, leaving no vulnerability unchecked.

Client Partnership

We work alongside our clients as trusted partners, providing transparent communication and collaborative problem-solving.

Continuous Innovation

We stay ahead of emerging threats through continuous learning, research, and adoption of cutting-edge security technologies.

Our Journey

Key milestones in our growth and evolution

2014

Company Founded

Established in Jakarta with mission to elevate Indonesia's cybersecurity landscape

2016

ISO 27001 Certified

Achieved international security management certification

2018

Expanded Services

Launched managed SOC and incident response capabilities

2020

National Recognition

Recognized as leading cybersecurity firm by industry awards

2022

Regional Growth

Expanded operations to serve clients across Southeast Asia

2024

Innovation Hub

Opened AI-powered threat intelligence research center

Leadership Team

Meet the experts guiding our mission to secure Indonesia's digital landscape

Ahmad Rizki

Chief Executive Officer

15+ years in cybersecurity, former CISO at major financial institution. CISSP, CISM certified.

Dewi Santoso

Chief Technology Officer

Expert in offensive security and threat intelligence. OSCP, OSCE certified ethical hacker.

Budi Wijaya

Head of Consulting

Specializes in security architecture and compliance. ISO 27001 Lead Auditor, PCI DSS QSA.

Siti Nurhaliza

Head of Incident Response

Former government cyber defense specialist. GCFA, GCIH certified digital forensics expert.

Whether you're looking for security services or interested in joining our team, we'd love to hear from you.
